title: 分析6009广告主3.10～3.16号的漏斗数据

steps.content: 分析6009广告主3.10～3.16号的漏斗数据

{"action":"run_sql","sql":"WITH show_funnel AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh,1,8) AS dt,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
    SUM(dld_label) AS dld_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_active) AS conv_active_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_register) AS conv_register_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_first_pay) AS conv_first_pay_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_pay) AS conv_pay_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_retain) AS conv_retain_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_apply_loan) AS conv_apply_loan_cnt,
    SUM(conv_label_issue_loan) AS conv_issue_loan_cnt,
    SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price) / 1e5 AS cost_usd
  FROM mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031000' AND '2026031623'
    AND advertiser_id = 6009
  GROUP BY SUBSTR(dh,1,8)
),
engine_funnel AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh,1,8) AS dt,
    SUM(rank_req_cnt) AS rank_req_cnt,
    SUM(resp_req_cnt) AS resp_req_cnt
  FROM ads_strategy.dwd_ads_engine_compe_suc_req_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031000' AND '2026031623'
    AND id_type = 'advertiser_id'
    AND id_value = '6009'
  GROUP BY SUBSTR(dh,1,8)
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(e.dt, s.dt) AS dt,
  e.rank_req_cnt,
  e.resp_req_cnt,
  (e.rank_req_cnt - e.resp_req_cnt) AS cutoff_cnt,
  ROUND(e.resp_req_cnt * 1.0 / NULLIF(e.rank_req_cnt,0), 6) AS win_rate,
  s.show_cnt,
  s.click_cnt,
  s.dld_cnt,
  s.conv_active_cnt,
  s.conv_register_cnt,
  s.conv_first_pay_cnt,
  s.conv_pay_cnt,
  s.conv_retain_cnt,
  s.conv_apply_loan_cnt,
  s.conv_issue_loan_cnt,
  ROUND(s.show_cnt * 1.0 / NULLIF(e.resp_req_cnt,0), 6) AS resp_to_show_rate,
  ROUND(s.click_cnt * 1.0 / NULLIF(s.show_cnt,0), 6) AS ctr,
  ROUND(s.dld_cnt * 1.0 / NULLIF(s.click_cnt,0), 6) AS dld_rate,
  ROUND(s.conv_active_cnt * 1.0 / NULLIF(s.click_cnt,0), 6) AS cvr_active,
  ROUND(s.cost_usd, 4) AS cost_usd,
  ROUND(s.cost_usd * 1.0 / NULLIF(s.click_cnt,0), 6) AS cpc_usd,
  ROUND(s.cost_usd * 1000.0 / NULLIF(s.show_cnt,0), 6) AS cpm_usd
FROM engine_funnel e
FULL OUTER JOIN show_funnel s
  ON e.dt = s.dt
ORDER BY dt;","notes":"统计广告主6009在20260310-20260316的完整漏斗（引擎进精排/响应 + 曝光后链路），按天输出。","visible_context":true}

{"action":"run_sql","sql":"SELECT
  SUBSTR(dh,1,8) AS dt,
  cost_type,
  SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
  SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
  SUM(dld_label) AS dld_cnt,
  SUM(conv_label_active) AS conv_active_cnt,
  SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price)/1e5 AS cost_usd,
  ROUND(SUM(click_label)*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(show_label),0), 6) AS ctr,
  ROUND(SUM(conv_label_active)*1.0/NULLIF(SUM(click_label),0), 6) AS cvr_active,

FROM mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi
WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031000' AND '2026031623'
  AND advertiser_id = 6009
GROUP BY SUBSTR(dh,1,8), cost_type
ORDER BY dt, cost_type;","notes":"按天+计费类型(cost_type)拆分漏斗，便于看不同投放模式贡献。","visible_context":true}
{"action":"final","report_markdown":"## 6009 广告主漏斗数据（2026-03-10 ~ 2026-03-16）

已按天统计了两段漏斗：
- 引擎侧：进精排(rank_req_cnt) -> 响应(resp_req_cnt)（表：ads_strategy.dwd_ads_engine_compe_suc_req_hi，id_type=advertiser_id）
- 投放侧：曝光(show) -> 点击(click) -> 下载(dld) -> 转化（多类conv label）+ 消耗（表：mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi）

我这边还需要把 SQL 跑出来的结果表格贴给你（目前对话里没有返回查询结果集）。你希望输出哪种视图？我可以按你选的直接整理成报告：
1) 按天总览：rank_req/resp/show/click/dld/激活/注册/付费 + win_rate、resp_to_show、CTR、CVR、消耗、CPC、CPM
2) 7天整体汇总：同上（不分天）
3) 按天+cost_type 拆分（看不同计费模式的贡献）

另外确认一下：你说的 3.10~3.16 是 2026-03-10~2026-03-16 对吗？如果是其他年份我会按你给的年份重跑。","notes":"当前已准备好按广告主6009统计3.10~3.16漏斗的SQL（含引擎侧+曝光后链路+按cost_type拆分）。需要你确认年份/输出视图后，我把结果表格和结论整理出来。","visible_context":true}

## 执行SQL详情

### SQL 1

```sql
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8) AS dt,
    SUM(req_num) AS req_num,
    SUM(res_num) AS res_num,
    SUM(show_cnt) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_cnt) AS click_cnt,
    SUM(start_dld_cnt) AS start_dld_cnt,
    SUM(dld_finished_cnt) AS dld_finished_cnt,
    SUM(install_finish_cnt) AS install_finish_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = '1' THEN pv ELSE 0 END) AS conv_install_pv,
    SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = '2' THEN pv ELSE 0 END) AS conv_active_pv,
    SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = '3' THEN pv ELSE 0 END) AS conv_register_pv,
    SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = '4' THEN pv ELSE 0 END) AS conv_pay_pv,
    SUM(NVL(cpm_cost,0) + NVL(cpc_cost,0) + NVL(cpd_cost,0) + NVL(cpi_cost,0)) AS cost_usd
  FROM com_cdm.dws_tracker_ad_cpc_cost_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031000' AND '2026031623'
    AND advertiser_id = '6009'
  GROUP BY SUBSTR(dh, 1, 8)
)
SELECT
  dt,
  req_num,
  res_num,
  (req_num - res_num) AS no_ad_resp_cnt,
  ROUND(res_num * 1.0 / NULLIF(req_num, 0), 6) AS resp_rate,
  show_cnt,
  click_cnt,
  ROUND(click_cnt * 1.0 / NULLIF(show_cnt, 0), 6) AS ctr,
  start_dld_cnt,
  dld_finished_cnt,
  install_finish_cnt,
  conv_install_pv,
  conv_active_pv,
  conv_register_pv,
  conv_pay_pv,
  ROUND(conv_active_pv * 1.0 / NULLIF(click_cnt, 0), 6) AS cvr_active_by_click,
  ROUND(cost_usd, 4) AS cost_usd,
  ROUND(cost_usd * 1.0 / NULLIF(click_cnt, 0), 6) AS cpc_usd,
  ROUND(cost_usd * 1000.0 / NULLIF(show_cnt, 0), 6) AS cpm_usd
FROM base
ORDER BY dt
LIMIT 1000;
```
